text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our third-year summer camp comes to an end.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You'll be late for the bus, you know.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Looks like I better get going! I'll see you for more
top-notch training when we're back at the
academy, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever boisterous and ready for more, Winning
Ticket joins Biwa Hayahide and Narita Taishin on
the bus.
choice_data_list: (I'm glad they managed to make up.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal is the Arima Kinen. It's time to get
pumped so we really can make it the best race
ever!
